methods.name: BuildOutputAst(System.Collections.Generic.List<ProtoCore.AST.AssociativeAST.AssociativeNode>)
methods.summary: Override this to declare the outputs for each of this Node's output ports.

params.name: inputAstNodes
params.doc: Ast for inputs indexed by input port index.

returns.doc: Sequence of AssociativeNodes representing this Node's code output.

methods.name: ClearDirtyFlag
methods.summary: NodeModel.ClearDirtyFlag

methods.name: ClearErrorsAndWarnings
methods.summary: Clears the errors/warnings that are generated when running the graph.

methods.name: ClearInfoMessages
methods.summary: Clears the info messages that are generated when running the graph. If the current State is Info or PersistentInfo, it will be set to Active. If the current State is Warning, Error, or another non-info state, it is preserved.

methods.name: ConfigureSnapEdges(System.Collections.Generic.IList<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.PortModel>)
methods.summary: Configures the snap edges. This class was made protected during refactoring for serialization. When RegisterInputPorts and RegisterOutputPorts are finally removed, this method should be called in a collection changed event handler on InPorts and OutPorts.

params.name: ports
params.doc: The ports.

methods.name: DispatchOnUIThread(System.Action)
methods.summary: Called by nodes for behavior that they want to dispatch on the UI thread Triggers event to be received by the UI. If no UI exists, behavior will not be executed.

methods.summary: NodeModel.Dispose

methods.name: Error(string)

methods.name: GetAstIdentifierForOutputIndex(int)
methods.summary: Fetches the ProtoAST Identifier for a given output port.

params.name: outputIndex
params.doc: Index of the output port.

returns.doc: Identifier corresponding to the given output port.

methods.summary: Returns the description from type information

methods.name: GetTypeHintForOutput(int)
methods.summary: The possible type of output at specified port. This type information is not necessary to be accurate.

methods.name: GetValue(int, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController)
methods.summary: Returns the most recent value of this node stored in an EngineController that has evaluated it.

methods.name: Info(string, bool)
methods.summary: Set an info on a node.

params.name: p
params.doc: The info text.

params.name: isPersistent
params.doc: Is the info persistent? If true, the info will not be cleared when the node is next evaluated. If false, the info will be cleared on the next evaluation.

methods.summary: Change the state of node to ElementState.AstBuildBroken and display "p" in tooltip window.

methods.summary: Callback for when this NodeModel has been compiled.

methods.summary: Called when the node's Workspace has been saved.

methods.name: RegisterAllPorts
methods.summary: Updates UI so that all ports reflect current state of node ports.

methods.summary: Reads inputs list and adds ports for each input. TODO: DYN-6445 - evaluate if this API can be removed.

methods.name: RegisterOutputPorts(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.PortData>)
methods.summary: Reads outputs list and adds ports for each output TODO: DYN-6445 - evaluate if this API can be removed.

methods.name: RequestVisualUpdateAsync(Dynamo.Scheduler.IScheduler, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController, Dynamo.Visualization.IRenderPackageFactory, bool)
methods.signature: bool RequestVisualUpdateAsync(Dynamo.Scheduler.IScheduler scheduler, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController engine, Dynamo.Visualization.IRenderPackageFactory factory, bool forceUpdate)
methods.summary: Call this method to asynchronously regenerate render package for this node. This method accesses core properties of a NodeModel and therefore is typically called on the main/UI thread.

params.name: scheduler
params.doc: An IScheduler on which the task will be scheduled.

params.name: engine
params.doc: The EngineController which will be used to get MirrorData for the node.

params.name: factory
params.doc: An IRenderPackageFactory which will be used to generate IRenderPackage objects.

params.name: forceUpdate
params.doc: Normally, render packages are only generated when the node's IsUpdated parameter is true. By setting forceUpdate to true, the render packages will be updated.

returns.doc: Flag which indicates if geometry update has been scheduled

methods.name: RequestVisualUpdateAsync(Dynamo.Scheduler.IScheduler, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController, Dynamo.Visualization.IRenderPackageFactory, bool, bool)
methods.signature: bool RequestVisualUpdateAsync(Dynamo.Scheduler.IScheduler scheduler, Dynamo.Engine.EngineController engine, Dynamo.Visualization.IRenderPackageFactory factory, bool forceUpdate, bool ignoreIsVisible)
methods.summary: Call this method to asynchronously regenerate render package for this node. This method accesses core properties of a NodeModel and therefore is typically called on the main/UI thread.

params.name: scheduler
params.doc: An IScheduler on which the task will be scheduled.

params.name: engine
params.doc: The EngineController which will be used to get MirrorData for the node.

params.name: factory
params.doc: An IRenderPackageFactory which will be used to generate IRenderPackage objects.

params.name: forceUpdate
params.doc: Normally, render packages are only generated when the node's IsUpdated parameter is true. By setting forceUpdate to true, the render packages will be updated.

params.name: ignoreIsVisible
params.doc: Normally, render packages are only generated when the node's IsVisible parameter is true. By setting ignore to true, the render package will be updated.

returns.doc: Flag which indicates if geometry update has been scheduled

methods.name: SelectDownstreamNeighbours
methods.summary: Recursively selects all nodes downstream to this node

methods.name: SelectNeighbors
methods.summary: Selects all neighboring nodes ans connector pins to this node

methods.name: SelectUpstreamAndDownstreamNeighbours
methods.summary: Recursively selects all nodes upstream and downstream to this node

methods.name: SelectUpstreamNeighbours
methods.summary: Recursively selects all nodes upstream to this node

methods.name: SerializeCore(System.Xml.XmlElement, Dynamo.Graph.SaveContext)
methods.summary: NodeModel.SerializeCore

methods.name: SetNameFromNodeNameAttribute
methods.summary: Sets the name of this node from the attributes on the class definining it.

methods.name: SetNodeStateBasedOnConnectionAndDefaults
methods.summary: Sets the Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ElementState for the node based on the port's default value status and connectivity.

methods.name: ShouldSerializeX
methods.summary: The default behavior for ModelBase objects is to not serialize the X and Y properties. This overload allows the serialization of the X property for NodeModel.

methods.name: ShouldSerializeY
methods.summary: The default behavior for ModelBase objects is to not serialize the X and Y properties. This overload allows the serialization of the Y property for NodeModel.

methods.name: TryGetInput(int, ref System.Tuple<int, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel>)
methods.signature: bool TryGetInput(int data, ref System.Tuple<int, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel> input)
methods.summary: Attempts to get the input for a certain port.

params.name: data
params.doc: PortData to look for an input for.

params.name: input
params.doc: If an input is found, it will be assigned.

returns.doc: True if there is an input, false otherwise.

methods.name: TryGetOutput(int, ref System.Collections.Generic.HashSet<System.Tuple<int, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel>>)
methods.signature: bool TryGetOutput(int output, ref System.Collections.Generic.HashSet<System.Tuple<int, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel>> newOutputs)
methods.summary: Attempts to get the output for a certain port.

params.name: output
params.doc: Index to look for an output for.

params.name: newOutputs
params.doc: If an output is found, it will be assigned.

returns.doc: True if there is an output, false otherwise.

methods.name: UpdateValueCore(Dynamo.Graph.UpdateValueParams)
methods.summary: NodeModel.UpdateValueCore

methods.name: UseLevelAndReplicationGuide(System.Collections.Generic.List<ProtoCore.AST.AssociativeAST.AssociativeNode>)
methods.summary: Apppend replication guide to the input parameter based on lacing strategy.

methods.name: Warning(string, bool)
methods.summary: Set a warning on a node.

params.name: p
params.doc: The warning text.

params.name: isPersistent
params.doc: Is the warning persistent? If true, the warning will not be cleared when the node is next evaluated and any additional warning messages will be concatenated to the persistent error message. If false, the warning will be cleared on the next evaluation.

properties.name: AllConnectors
properties.summary: All of the connectors entering and exiting the NodeModel.

properties.name: AreAllOutputsConnected
properties.summary: Are all the outputs of this node connected?

properties.name: ArgumentLacing
properties.summary: Control how arguments lists of various sizes are laced.

properties.name: AstIdentifierBase
properties.summary: Return a variable whose value will be displayed in preview window. Derived nodes may overwrite this function to display default value of this node. E.g., code block node may want to display the value of the left hand side variable of last statement.

properties.name: AstIdentifierForPreview
properties.summary: ProtoAST Identifier for result of the node before any output unpacking has taken place. If there is only one output for the node, this is equivalent to GetAstIdentifierForOutputIndex(0).

properties.name: AstIdentifierGuid
properties.summary: A unique ID that will be appended to all identifiers of this node.

properties.name: CachedValue
properties.summary: The value of this node after the most recent computation As this property could be modified by the virtual machine, it's dangerous to access this value without using the active Scheduler. Use the Scheduler to remove the possibility of race conditions.

properties.name: CanUpdatePeriodically
properties.summary: NodeModel.CanUpdatePeriodically

properties.name: Category
properties.summary: Category property

properties.name: CreationName
properties.summary: The unique name that was created the node by

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Description of this Node.

properties.name: DictionaryLink
properties.summary: Dictionary Link property

properties.name: DismissedAlerts
properties.summary: NodeModel.DismissedAlerts

properties.name: DismissedAlertsCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of dismissed error/warning/info messages.

properties.name: DisplayLabels
properties.summary: Enable or disable label display. Default is false.

properties.name: GUID
properties.summary: Id for this node, must be unique within the graph.

properties.name: InPorts
properties.summary: Collection of PortModels representing all Input ports.

properties.name: InputData
properties.summary: NodeModel.InputData

properties.name: InputNodes
properties.summary: NodeModel.InputNodes

properties.name: IsConvertible
properties.summary: If this node is allowed to be converted to AST node in nodes to code conversion.

properties.name: IsCustomFunction
properties.summary: Returns whether this node represents a built-in or custom function.

properties.name: IsFrozen
properties.summary: A flag indicating whether the node is frozen. When a node is frozen, the node, and all nodes downstream will not participate in execution. This will return true if any upstream node is frozen or if the node was explicitly frozen.

properties.name: IsInErrorState
properties.summary: If the state of node is Error or AstBuildBroken

properties.name: IsInputNode
properties.summary: Input nodes are used in Customizer and Presets. Input nodes can be numbers, number sliders, strings, bool, code blocks, custom nodes and color palette node. This property is true for nodes that are potential inputs for Customizers and Presets.

properties.name: IsModified
properties.summary: NodeModel.IsModified

properties.name: IsOutputNode
properties.summary: Output nodes are used by applications that consume graphs outside of Dynamo such as Optioneering, Optimization, and Dynamo Player. Output nodes can be any node that returns a single output or a dictionary. Code block nodes and Custom nodes are specifically excluded at this time even though they can return a single output for sake of clarity.

properties.name: IsPartiallyApplied
properties.summary: Is this node being applied partially, resulting in a partial function?

properties.name: IsResizable
properties.summary: Indicates whether this node supports user-resizable UI elements

properties.name: IsSetAsInput
properties.summary: This property is user-controllable via a checkbox and is set to true when a user wishes to include this node in a Customizer as an interactive control.

properties.name: IsSetAsOutput
properties.summary: This property is user-controllable via a checkbox and is set to true when a user wishes to include this node in the OutputData block of the Dyn file.

properties.name: IsTopMostNode
properties.summary: If node is connected to some other node(other than Output) then it is not a 'top' node

properties.name: IsVisible
properties.summary: Returns whether the node is to be included in visualizations.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name that is displayed in the UI for this NodeModel.

properties.name: NeedsForceExecution
properties.summary: NodeModel.NeedsForceExecution

properties.name: NodeInfos
properties.summary: A publicly accessible collector of all Info/Warning/Error data

properties.name: NodeType
properties.summary: The NodeType property provides a name which maps to the server type for the node. This property should only be used for serialization.

properties.name: OutPorts
properties.summary: Collection of PortModels representing all Output ports.

properties.name: OutputData
properties.summary: NodeModel.OutputData

properties.name: OutputNodes
properties.summary: NodeModel.OutputNodes

properties.name: PreviewPinned
properties.summary: Indicates if node preview is pinned

properties.name: RaisesModificationEvents
properties.summary: Indicate if the node should respond to NodeModified event. It always should be true, unless is temporarily set to false to avoid flood of Modified event.

properties.name: ShouldDisplayPreview
properties.summary: NodeModel.ShouldDisplayPreview

properties.name: State
properties.summary: The Node's state, which determines the coloring of the Node in the canvas.

properties.name: Tags
properties.summary: Search tags for this Node.

events.name: ConnectorAdded
events.summary: Event fired when a new ConnectorModel has been attached to one of this node's inputs.

events.name: Modified
events.summary: Event fired when the node's DesignScript AST should be recompiled

events.name: NodeExecutionBegin
events.summary: Event triggered before a node is executed. Note: This event will only be triggered when profiling is active.

events.name: NodeExecutionEnd
events.summary: Event triggered after a node is executed. Note: This event will only be triggered when profiling is active.

events.name: NodeInfoMessagesClearing
events.summary: Event triggered whenever the node re-executes to clear its info messages

events.name: NodeMessagesClearing
events.summary: Event triggered whenever the node re-executes to clear its warnings and errors.

events.name: NodeWarningMessagesClearing
events.summary: Event triggered when the node clears only warning messages

events.name: PortConnected
events.summary: Event triggered when a port is connected.

events.name: PortDisconnected
events.summary: Event triggered when a port is disconnected.

events.name: UpdateASTCollection
events.summary: Event fired when the node's DesignScript AST should be updated. This event deletes the frozen nodes from AST collection.
